description: CompositionBlack scarf made of 100% acrylic, has a 2x2 rib knit construction and tonal timberland tree logo embroideryFittingOne size fits mostWash careonly hand wash in cold waterDo not ironDrip dryA great way to finish off your outdoor-inspired outfit is to wrap yourself in the timberland Heavy Ribbed Winter Scarf. This Timberland scarf has been made using durable, breathable acrylic to provide lightweight warmth and keep you comfortable all winter.
